free_text: a three-element telescope Delta-E detector was a gas
ionization chamber of the Frischgrid design and was
operated with P-10 gas (90% argon, 10% methane) . The
second element in the detector telescope, was a fully
surface barrier detector. The third element was a
surface barrier detector of 450 mm2 area.
The targets used were 10-cm x 10-cm Al, Ag, and Ta
All data were corrected for energy losses in the
Absolute cross sections were obtained by

This process introduced an estimated 20% uncertainty
